dslRule.dsl:
functionDeclaration functiondeclaration_1 where
	and(
		functiondeclaration_1.body contain functionCall functioncall_1 where
			functioncall_1.name match "round[a-zA-Z]+",
		functiondeclaration_1.parameters contain alias_1 where
			alias_1 is valueDeclaration,
		functiondeclaration_1.parameters contain alias_2 where
			alias_2 is valueDeclaration
	);
dslRule.description: 规则描述信息，需用户修改
